roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:100 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  16  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM, CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HEWILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILLBE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, APRIL 17, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TOMODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 60 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 60 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPON A VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:03-24-14 /X:PAROLEEORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
